output.fixed_sql:
WITH transactions AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('fct_transaction') }}
),
venues AS (
    SELECT * FROM {{ ref('dim_venue') }}
    WHERE IS_CURRENT = TRUE
),
final AS (
    SELECT
        t.EVENT_ID,
        t.EVENT_DATE,
        v.VENUE_NAME,
        v.CITY,
        v.STATE,
        SUM(t.GMS) AS total_gms,
        COUNT(t.TRANSACTION_ID) AS transaction_count
    FROM transactions t
    JOIN venues v ON t.VENUE_ID = v.VENUE_ID
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5
)
SELECT * FROM final
output.fix_description: Added WHERE IS_CURRENT = TRUE filter to the venues CTE to select only the current SCD Type 2 record per VENUE_ID. This eliminates the fanout caused by multiple historical records per venue.

join_analysis.root_cause: SCD Type 2 dimension with IS_CURRENT flag — multiple rows per VENUE_ID without filter

decision_log.decision: Added IS_CURRENT = TRUE filter to dimension CTE
decision_log.rationale: dim_venue has 42K rows but only 15K distinct VENUE_IDs (2.8 rows per key on average). IS_CURRENT column exists — filtering to TRUE gives 1:1 cardinality and eliminates fanout.

alternatives_considered.reason: Would work but IS_CURRENT flag is the intended pattern
More complex and IS_CURRENT is sufficient

tool_calls.input: SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT VENUE_ID) FROM DW.CORE.VENUE_DIM
SELECT COUNT(*), COUNT(DISTINCT VENUE_ID) FROM DW.CORE.VENUE_DIM WHERE IS_CURRENT = TRUE
